name: Cash Store
description_short: San Antonio, TX Cash Store at 6604 FM78 Suite 100 offers payday and title loans with quick approval.
description_long:
The Cash Store location at 6604 FM78 Suite 100 in San Antonio, TX is a standalone storefront serving residents of the greater San Antonio area. This branch operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 2 PM, remaining closed on Sundays. The convenient FM78 location makes it accessible to customers across San Antonio and surrounding neighborhoods.

At this San Antonio, TX location, you can access payday loans, title loans, and fast cash advances with same-day approval. For immediate assistance or to discuss your financial needs, call the branch directly at (210) 666-2611. The experienced team at Cash Store in San Antonio specializes in helping residents secure emergency funds when they need them most.

When visiting the Cash Store on FM78 in San Antonio, bring a valid government-issued ID, proof of income, and proof of residency. Many customers rely on this Cash Store location for bridge funding between paychecks or emergency expenses. Plan your visit during weekday hours (10 AM–6 PM) for the full range of services.
pros: Same-day funding available after in-store application approval
Online pre-qualification lets you check eligibility before visiting the branch
Bad credit is explicitly considered — not an automatic disqualifier
Accepts Matricula Consular card as valid ID, accessible to non-citizen borrowers
Existing customers can refinance or re-borrow remotely by phone
4.9-star Google rating across 208 reviews — unusually high for a storefront lender
Netspend Prepaid Mastercard available for customers without a traditional bank account
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or loan amount range disclosed anywhere on the website
In-store visit is required to complete the application — not a fully online lender
Requires checking account active for at least 30 days, excluding recently banked applicants
Limited hours (Mon–Fri 10am–6pm, Sat 10am–2pm, closed Sunday) restrict same-day access
As a bad-credit installment lender, rates are likely high — full cost of borrowing is opaque
best_for: Houston-area borrowers with bad or no credit who need cash the same day
Consumers who prefer in-person guidance through the loan application process
Immigrant borrowers who hold a Matricula Consular card rather than a U.S. driver's license
Existing Cash Store customers needing to refinance or extend a current installment loan
diagnosis: Cash Store is best for Houston borrowers with bad credit who need cash urgently and are comfortable visiting a branch in person. The main caveat is full cost transparency: APRs and fees are not published, so consumers should request the full cost disclosure before accepting any loan terms.
services: Retail refinancing for existing loan customers
Remote reloans by phone for existing customers
Matricula Consular card acceptance as government ID
meta_description: Cash Store at 6604 FM78, San Antonio, TX. Fast payday and title loans with same-day approval.
seo_title: Cash Store in San Antonio, TX | CreditDoc
